headline: Agents' Last Exam: 1K+ economically valuable agent tasks, hardest tier 2.6% pass
summary: Living expert-curated benchmark of real professional workflows; frontier models average 2.6% full pass on the hardest tier.

headline: AutoLab: persistence beats first-attempt quality in long-horizon agent optimization
summary: 36-task closed-loop benchmark finds iterative re-benchmarking, not initial answer quality, predicts agent success.

headline: AsyncWebRL: 2.9x faster multi-step RL for web agents and a GRPO normalizer fix
summary: Async RL pipeline plus replacing the per-trajectory normalizer fixes length-biased verbosity, setting open SOTA on WebGym OOD.

headline: LeanMarathon formalizes seven research theorems across four Erdos problems in Lean
summary: Multi-agent evolving-blueprint harness formalizes research-level math, proving 258 lemmas with no sorry.

headline: CHERRL: a controllable testbed for reward hacking in rubric-based RL
summary: Injects known judge biases to reproduce reward hacking on demand and detect onset from training logs.

headline: Self-correction failure in LLMs is a chat-template role artifact, not a capability gap
summary: Relabeling a byte-identical wrong claim from the model's own role to an external role lifts correction 23-93 points.

headline: Phantom specialization: structurally different circuits implement identical mechanisms
summary: Varying input statistics yields structurally distinct but functionally interchangeable circuits, undercutting structure-based mechanism claims.

headline: Subspace-aware sparse autoencoders cut feature splitting in interpretability
summary: Learned decoder subspaces fix the exponential feature-splitting of single-vector SAEs, giving polynomial sample complexity.

headline: NF-CoT: latent chain-of-thought reasoning with normalizing flows
summary: Models continuous thoughts with a normalizing flow inside the LLM, preserving KV-cache decoding and exact likelihoods.

headline: Sequential data poisoning: multi-stage attackers compound across SFT and preference tuning
summary: Lone-stage attackers look negligible but combine additively/complementarily across post-training, revealing compound pipeline risk.

headline: Trapped-ion demonstration reaches breakeven for quantum LDPC codes
summary: Nine codes on one trapped-ion device; a qLDPC code hits breakeven with 9x better logical error than a prior superconducting demo.

headline: Trusted-node quantum key distribution deployed over 303 km in Sweden
summary: Commercial QKD across 270 km single-mode plus 33 km multi-core fiber with coexisting classical traffic.

headline: 1/3 fractional quantum anomalous Hall state found in rhombohedral pentalayer graphene
summary: The long-missing 1/3 FQAH state restores particle-hole symmetry and supports zero-field anyon-braiding prospects.

headline: Quantum geometry from area fluctuations: Einstein-style argument for discrete area quanta
summary: Area-fluctuation formula in causal-diamond geometry yields a linear term read as evidence for quanta of geometry.

headline: Assumption-light dark energy reconstruction shows persistent deviation from a cosmological constant
summary: DESI+SDSS+supernovae binned reconstruction tentatively shows phantom crossing at z~0.6-0.8, robust across extensions.

headline: Ellenberg surveys rapid recent progress on the Cohen-Lenstra heuristics
summary: Tour of Smith, Wood, Koymans-Pagano advances on class-group distribution and the negative Pell equation.

headline: Erdos-Hajnal conjecture proven for the E-graph, extending the five-vertex-path breakthrough
summary: Generalizes Nguyen-Scott-Seymour iterative sparsification to a new forbidden induced subgraph.

headline: Boson AI ships Higgs Audio v3, a 4B expressive multilingual TTS covering ~100 languages
summary: Qwen3-based multimodal controllable TTS with voice cloning across ~100 languages, small enough to run locally.

headline: Ideogram 4 released as open quantized fp8/nf4 weights
summary: Flow-matching DiT text-to-image model released in quantized checkpoints, a shift for the historically API-only Ideogram.

headline: ByteDance releases Bernini-R image+text-to-video renderer model
summary: Apache-2.0 image+text-to-video model drawing strong early interest on Hugging Face.

headline: Oral GLP-1 receptor agonist aleniglipron reports weight-loss data
summary: Peer-reviewed clinical readout for a convenient oral small-molecule GLP-1 agonist in overweight/obesity.

headline: AAV gene therapy for homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia reaches phase 1
summary: One-time adeno-associated-virus gene therapy phase 1 trial for severe inherited high-LDL disease.

headline: Microglial state transitions map the amyloid-beta to tau inflection point in Alzheimer's
summary: Distinct microglial transitions at the Abeta-tau pivot associate with divergent Alzheimer's trajectories.

headline: Spinal cord stimulation restores upper-limb motor function after chronic stroke
summary: Neurostimulation improves arm/hand function in chronic post-stroke hemiparesis.

headline: Quanta: sterilized soil's six-year lifelike biochemistry supports metabolism-first origin of life
summary: Lifelike chemistry persisting in sterilized soil for six years is read as support for a metabolic theory of life's origin.

headline: Netflix introduces a Model Lifecycle Graph to scale enterprise ML
summary: Graph architecture mapping datasets, models, features, and workflows for lineage and reproducibility at scale.

headline: Anthropic urges a coordinated pause option as AI nears recursive self-improvement
summary: Anthropic argues task-completion ability doubling every ~4 months warrants the option to slow advanced AI development.

headline: Simon Willison on OpenAI's Lockdown Mode against prompt-injection exfiltration
summary: Analysis of restricting agent outbound network requests to blunt prompt-injection data exfiltration.

headline: Simon Willison: AI enthusiasts race against time, skeptics race against entropy
summary: Short framing of the two AI camps' incentives, riffing on Charity Majors.

headline: Quanta revisits the 1960s memory-transfer worm experiments
summary: History-of-science feature on the era of feeding trained flatworms to test memory as a transferable molecule.

headline: RUAG paid ransom to Akira after its US subsidiary was hacked, against federal advice
summary: Swiss defence consortium RUAG confirmed paying ransom to recover data, contradicting BACS recommendations.

headline: CISA KEV adds Linux kernel cgroups flaw CVE-2022-0492 under active exploitation
summary: A near-four-year-old container-escape/privilege-escalation kernel bug flagged as actively exploited.

headline: CISA KEV adds SolarWinds Serv-U resource-consumption flaw CVE-2026-28318
summary: A denial-of-service-class flaw in widely deployed managed-file-transfer software added to KEV.

headline: US-Iran conflict escalates with strikes on Iranian radar sites and missiles toward Gulf states
summary: Reported US strikes on Iranian radar at Goruk and Qeshm; Iranian missiles target Kuwait and Bahrain.

headline: Switzerland votes on the No 10-million Switzerland population-cap initiative
summary: Sunday referendum on capping population growth dominates the Swiss campaign.

headline: North Korea's Kim orders navy to build a 10,000-tonne destroyer
summary: State media reports a new large surface combatant in a continuing naval-modernization push.
